ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Images with size parameters (e.g. ![[image.png|200]]) are now handled differently to fix rendering in tables. This may cause notes with images to show up as changed. This is expected and safe to publish.
ast.target: 带有尺寸参数的图片（例如 ![[image.png|200]]）现在处理方式不同，以修复表格中的渲染问题。\n\t\t\t\t\t这可能导致包含图片的笔记显示为已更改。这是预期行为，可以安全发布。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
Differences between your local file and the published file.
The content may look a bit different from your note. This is because it shows the note after being processed by the plugin.
ast.target:
您的本地文件与已发布文件之间的差异。\n\t\t
\n\t\t内容可能与您的笔记略有不同。这是因为它显示的是经过插件处理后的笔记。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source:
• One rule-per line
  • The format is [from_vault_path]:[to_garden_path]
  • Matching will exit on first match
ast.target:
• 每行一条规则
  • 格式为 [from_vault_path]:[to_garden_path]
  • 匹配将在首次匹配时退出

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: You've reached your usage limit. Upgrade your plan to continue publishing.
ast.target: 您已达到使用限制。升级您的计划以继续发布。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Define regex filters to replace note content before publishing.
ast.target: 定义正则表达式过滤器，以在发布前替换笔记内容。

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: A GitHub token with contents permissions. You can see how to generate it
ast.target: 一个具有内容权限的 GitHub 令牌。您可以查看如何生成它

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Define rules to rewrite note paths/folder structure, using following
		syntax:
ast.target: 定义规则以重写笔记路径/文件夹结构，使用以下\n\t\t语法：

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Example: If you want the vault folder "Personal/Journal" to be shown as
		only "Journal" in the left file sidebar in the garden, add the line
		"Personal/Journal:Journal"
ast.target: 示例：如果您希望保险库文件夹 \"Personal/Journal\" 在花园的左侧文件侧边栏中仅显示为\n\t\t\"Journal\"，请添加行\n\t\t\"Personal/Journal:Journal\"

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
To define a folder as the root folder for the garden, use
		`[from_vault_path]:`
ast.target: 要将某个文件夹定义为花园的根文件夹，请使用\n\t\t`[from_vault_path]:`

ast.name: textContent
ast.source:
Saving will not update the garden directly, and changes will be visible
		in the publication center.
ast.target: 保存不会直接更新花园，更改将在发布中心可见。

ast.name: error
ast.target: 处理画布文本节点时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 读取画布组背景时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 加载样式设置插件时出错

ast.name: info
ast.target: 网站图标相同，跳过更新

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of the GitHub repository

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize the order of files and folders in your site's navigation.
ast.target: 自定义站点导航中文件和文件夹的顺序。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define rules to rewrite note folder structure in the garden. See the modal for more information.
ast.target: 定义规则以重写花园中的笔记文件夹结构。更多信息请参见模态框。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show detailed logs in the developer console. Useful for troubleshooting.
ast.target: 在开发者控制台中显示详细日志。用于故障排除。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Absolute path to your local digital garden folder. Used by the 'Export Garden to Local Folder' command.
ast.target: 本地数字花园文件夹的绝对路径。由“导出花园到本地文件夹”命令使用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default settings for each published note. These can be overwritten per note via frontmatter.
ast.target: 每个已发布笔记的默认设置。这些可以通过笔记的frontmatter覆盖。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Determines whether to show a link back to the homepage or not.
ast.target: 决定是否显示返回主页的链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, notes will show its local graph in a sidebar on desktop and at the bottom of the page on mobile.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记将在桌面端的侧边栏和移动端的页面底部显示其本地关系图。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, notes will show backlinks in a sidebar on desktop and at the bottom of the page on mobile.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记将在桌面端的侧边栏和移动端的页面底部显示反向链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, notes will show all headers as a table of content in a sidebar on desktop. It will not be shown on mobile devices.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记将在桌面端的侧边栏中显示所有标题作为目录。移动端设备上不会显示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, the title of the note will show on top of the page.
ast.target: 开启后，笔记标题将显示在页面顶部。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, a filetree will be shown on your site.
ast.target: 开启后，您的站点将显示文件树。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, users will be able to search through the content of your site.
ast.target: 开启后，用户将能够搜索您站点的内容。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, hovering over links to notes in your garden shows a scrollable preview.
ast.target: 开启后，将鼠标悬停在花园中笔记的链接上会显示可滚动的预览。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When turned on, tags in your frontmatter will be displayed on each note. If search is enabled, clicking on a tag will bring up a search for all notes containing that tag.
ast.target: 开启后，frontmatter中的标签将显示在每个笔记上。如果启用了搜索，点击标签将显示包含该标签的所有笔记的搜索结果。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize labels and messages shown on your garden (Search, Backlinks, etc.)
ast.target: 自定义花园中显示的标签和消息（搜索、反向链接等）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：“提及此页面的页面”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default: "No other pages mentions this page"
ast.target: 默认：“没有其他页面提及此页面”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 默认：“选择一个结果进行预览”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Default: "Enter your search text in the box above"
ast.target: 默认：“在上方的框中输入您的搜索文本”

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The name of your site. This will be displayed as the site header.
ast.target: 您站点的名称。这将显示为站点标题。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to an image in your vault to use as a logo instead of the sitename. Leave blank to show sitename text.
ast.target: 保险库中用作徽标的图片路径，替代站点名称。留空则显示站点名称文本。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Language code (ISO 639-1) for the main language of your site. This is used to set the correct language on your site to assist search engines and browsers.
ast.target: 站点主要语言的语言代码（ISO 639-1）。用于设置站点的正确语言，以辅助搜索引擎和浏览器。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Path to an svg in your vault you wish to use as a favicon. Leave blank to use default. Must be square! (eg. 16x16)
ast.target: 保险库中您希望用作网站图标的SVG路径。留空则使用默认值。必须是正方形！（例如16x16）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: By default, the images on your site are compressed to make your site load faster. If you instead want to use the full resolution images, enable this setting.
ast.target: 默认情况下，您站点上的图片会被压缩以加快加载速度。如果您想使用全分辨率图片，请启用此设置。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The format string to render timestamp on the garden. Must be luxon compatible
ast.target: 用于在花园中渲染时间戳的格式字符串。必须与luxon兼容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key to get the created timestamp from the frontmatter. Leave blank to get the value from file creation time. The value can be any value that luxon Datetime.fromISO can parse.
ast.target: 从frontmatter获取创建时间戳的键。留空则从文件创建时间获取值。该值可以是luxon Datetime.fromISO能解析的任何值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key to get the updated timestamp from the frontmatter. Leave blank to get the value from file update time. The value can be any value that luxon Datetime.fromISO can parse.
ast.target: 用于从 frontmatter 获取更新时间戳的键。留空则从文件更新时间获取值。该值可以是 luxon Datetime.fromISO 能解析的任何值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key for setting css-classes to the note body from the frontmatter.
ast.target: 用于从 frontmatter 设置笔记正文 CSS 类的键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key to get the note icon value from the frontmatter
ast.target: 用于从 frontmatter 获取笔记图标值的键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The default value for note icon if not specified
ast.target: 未指定时笔记图标的默认值。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Transform the URL from "/My Folder/My Note/" to "/my-folder/my-note". If your note titles contains non-English characters, this should be disabled.
ast.target: 将 URL 从 \"/My Folder/My Note/\" 转换为 \"/my-folder/my-note\"。如果您的笔记标题包含非英文字符，应禁用此功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define custom rules to replace parts of the note before publishing.
ast.target: 定义自定义规则，在发布前替换笔记的某些部分。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Unable to check for updates. Please check your connection and credentials.
ast.target: 无法检查更新。请检查您的网络连接和凭据。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 显示笔记的本地关系图 (dg-show-local-graph)

ast.target: 检查快照以确保没有意外更改

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Note does not have the dg-publish: true set. Please add this and try again.
ast.target: 笔记未设置 dg-publish: true。请添加此设置后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set the garden base url in the settings
ast.target: 请在设置中配置花园基础 URL

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to render dataview query. Please update the dataview plugin to the latest version.
ast.target: 无法渲染 dataview 查询。请将 dataview 插件更新到最新版本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to render dataviewjs query. Please update the dataview plugin to the latest version.
ast.target: 无法渲染 dataviewjs 查询。请将 dataview 插件更新到最新版本。

ast.name: Notice

ast.target: 无法渲染内联 dataview 查询。请将 dataview 插件更新到最新版本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to render inline dataviewjs query. Please update the dataview plugin to the latest version.
ast.target: 无法渲染内联 dataviewjs 查询。请将 dataview 插件更新到最新版本。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Config error: You need to define a Forestry.md Garden Key in the plugin settings
ast.target: 配置错误：您需要在插件设置中定义一个 Forestry.md 花园密钥

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Config error: You need to define a GitHub repo in the plugin settings
ast.target: 配置错误：您需要在插件设置中定义一个 GitHub 仓库

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Config error: You need to define a GitHub Username in the plugin settings
ast.target: 配置错误：您需要在插件设置中定义一个 GitHub 用户名

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Config error: You need to define a GitHub Token in the plugin settings
ast.target: 配置错误：您需要在插件设置中定义一个 GitHub 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to update settings. Make sure you have an internet connection.
ast.target: 更新设置失败。请确保您有网络连接。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to upload logo. Check the developer console for details.
ast.target: 上传徽标失败。请检查开发者控制台获取详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Set a local garden folder path in plugin settings first.
ast.target: 请先在插件设置中设置本地花园文件夹路径。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Adding publish flag to note and publishing it.
ast.target: 正在为笔记添加发布标志并发布它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: A publish operation is already in progress. Please wait for it to complete.
ast.target: 发布操作正在进行中。请等待其完成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在处理要发布的文件...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to publish multiple notes, something went wrong.
ast.target: 无法发布多个笔记，出现错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 正在将花园导出到本地文件夹...

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No file is open/active. Please open a file and try again.
ast.target: 没有打开/活动的文件。请打开一个文件后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 笔记 URL 已复制到剪贴板

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to copy note URL to clipboard, something went wrong.
ast.target: 无法将笔记 URL 复制到剪贴板，出现错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: The current file is not a markdown or canvas file. Please open a supported file and try again.
ast.target: 当前文件不是 Markdown 或 Canvas 文件。请打开一个支持的文件后重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Successfully published note to your garden.
ast.target: 笔记已成功发布到您的花园。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to publish note, something went wrong.
ast.target: 无法发布笔记，出现错误。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This note is already set as the garden home page.
ast.target: 此笔记已设置为花园主页。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Publishing blocked: Storage limit exceeded. Free up space or upgrade at dashboard.forestry.md/settings
ast.target: 发布被阻止：存储空间已超限。请释放空间或在 dashboard.forestry.md/settings 升级。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Publish All Notes Marked for Publish
ast.target: 发布所有标记为发布的笔记

ast.name: name
ast.target: 将花园导出到本地文件夹

ast.name: text
ast.target: 笔记设置文档可在以下位置获取

ast.name: text
ast.source: Approve the PR to make the changes go live.
ast.target: 批准 PR 以使更改生效。

ast.name: text
ast.source: ⚠️ Important: Both notes should be published from the Publication Center to ensure your garden has a proper home page.
ast.target: ⚠️ 重要提示：两个笔记都应从发布中心发布，以确保您的花园拥有正确的主页。
